How much can one person really handle? A bond can only survive if both sides put in effort. If someone keeps pushing the other person away, keeps blaming them, keeps hurting them , even when that person has done nothing but try to understand, how does that work? 
Maybe that person did try to hold on, over and over again. Maybe they silently took all the pain, tried to be patient, and tried to stay. But for how long? They’re human too, they have their own life, academic pressure, family. The biggest thing, their own heart that can break like yours.
Before feeling like you’ve been left alone, maybe look back and see how hard that person tried to stay, how much they sacrificed just to not lose you. But if you keep saying they're the reason for your problems, stop talking, push them away, keep shutting them out. what else are they supposed to do? Beg you to stay?
You can’t expect something from someone that you’re not willing to give. If one person is always trying to understand, always holding on, but the other person doesn’t even try.
How is that fair?
Maybe now that person just wants you to hold on, try to understand, put your ego aside and talk,  just show a little effort to stay with them.
Maybe they just want you to know they’ve always been there for you, and they still want to be. They never wanted to leave you alone.
You just have to hold on to them and that will be enough.

text:
#1900
I find myself in a dark reality right now—probably darker than anything I've ever known. Let me share it because I know you will be shocked.

First of all, being a good guy from an early age always comes with a fatal backlash. How? Because others keep grinding down your self-worth every day, comparing you to your past. For a moment, let's put my guards down, accept their words, and take them as true. But why did this situation occur? The answer is obvious—addiction. I won’t go into details, but addiction is not just bad; it’s the worst thing one can be attached to. It sears into you, inflicting pain every moment without you even realizing it.

Second, what happens when you try to be good again and stay away from it? Your body shivers until you give in. Your mind is beaten down by relentless thoughts—pleasure and prudence clashing like titans. Your heart races uncontrollably, spiraling into chaos. And despite denying every bit of reality, the addiction keeps rubbing out your own susceptibility and consciousness. My mind is filled with desperate wishes, eerie whispers, and endless ushers of longing.

Oh Lord, how can I break free from this filth? These burning, heavy shackles of pain and guilt suppress the very core of my soul, turning me into a wandering madman.

Yet, you people keep judging me. Now, I don’t think I can come back. So I’m telling you—whatever you do, stay away. Stay aloof from those puffs, peeks, tries, and taunts.

~A Scarlet Reminder

text:
#1877
I never thought you could say something like that. Never, not even in my wildest dreams.

You were the first and only safe place in my life where I could breathe, where I could let my guard down and just be me. I trusted you with everything..the things I never dared to say out loud, the wounds I never let anyone see. But thank you... thank you for making me realize that I should never share anything with anyone, not even if I'm breaking, not even if I’m drowning.

Thank you for teaching me that no matter how much I crave for happiness or peace, I should never chase them. That no matter how thirsty I am for warmth, I should never reach for it. Because in the end, everything comes back to haunt me. People never forget. They never let you forget. They’ll always remind you of your mistakes, throw your past at you like knives, even when you’re already bleeding.

So, thank you for that realization that I don’t deserve happiness. That I don’t deserve care. That I don’t deserve love.

Thank you for the traumas that will never leave me, for the scars that will burn a hundred times stronger than before. Thank you for adding more insecurities to the ones I was already drowning in. Thank you for every beautiful memories...

I’m sorry for everything. I shouldn’t have come into your life and ruin it. I never planned for it trust me! Please forgive me if you can. We should’ve never met. I should’ve never come close to you.

Please, if you can, forgive me. I really am sorry. I promise I won’t bother you ever again.

I’ll always remember you. I’ll remember how you once helped me heal, only to shatter me all over again.

~anonymous

text:
#1873
I still have a heart that beats - a heart that resonates with what I perceive. It bleeds when I witness injustice, compelling me to act.

I was born a fool. I wish I had a brain with a few more IQ points - one that could prioritize, one that could think rationally instead of always following my heart and instincts.

As injustices shake me, I act - even when silence might have kept my life stable. I find myself dragged into problems, trying to solve them, but often resisting. My incompetence and lack of intellect only result in near zero contributions. To achieve a mentionable contribution, I need to put a whole lot of time than others.

It’s been 30 days since the campus closed. I watch my batchmates pushing themselves to learn new skills; some are gearing up for research. They’re making the most of their time.

Meanwhile, here I am - stuck on something, clinging to imaginary others who don’t even care about their own rights. I’ve ruined everything - my present, my future.

Though I’ll stick with it, that’s just me. I can’t control myself.

I do wish for a stable life - to make my parents proud, to keep my family happy, to be a dad who can fulfill all his children’s wishes. But deep down, I don’t think my stars will allow it.

~anonymous

Admission season er por, I got into DU IBA and he got into KUET, and he was very salty about it and the LDR we would have. Jak classes start holo and he left for Khulna. #1857
We are trapped in the prison of this world, constantly chasing success while unknowingly drifting away from the afterlife  —an undeniable truth. But if you take just two minutes to think calmly, you’ll realize that many of us aren’t even achieving what is considered "success" in this life, nor are we preparing for the afterlife. So, what exactly are we doing? We neither put in enough effort to succeed in this temporary world nor take the necessary steps for our eternal hereafter. Then what are we truly caught up in? Just take a moment—pause, reflect, and ask yourself: What are you really doing with your life? It may not be relatable to everyone, but I believe many will find themselves in these words.

~another overthinker from 23

text:
#1851
To #1842,

Honestly... I never meant to hurt you. I didn't mean to make you feel like you weren't important to me. God, looking back now, I can see exactly how I did it though. How I just... pulled away without even noticing. Making excuses instead of really listening when you needed me most.Those late night talks we used to have? Where we'd talk about absolutely everything and nothing at the same time? I miss that so much. I miss your voice. The way you'd always say goodnight, and I'd say it back... like this little thing we had. I would actually wait for your calls. I would get excited seeing your name pop up on my phone. But somewhere along the way, I just... stopped trying. Got too comfortable. Thought you'd always be there no matter what.
When you brought up that stuff about priorities, I just brushed it off. Didn't even try to understand what you were really saying. Now when I read your messages from back then, I can see how much you were hurting. You were giving everything while I just took and took. Never even stopped to ask if you were okay. You needed reassurance, and I completely failed you there.
Then when you finally ended things... I was just lost. Part of me couldn't believe it was real, like maybe you'd change your mind. But deep down? I knew it was coming. I pushed you to that point. Had to have seen it coming. You were just protecting yourself from someone who wasn't fully showing up. But in that moment? I couldn't even react right. I felt numb at first, but then it hit me like a truck.
I keep replaying all these moments in my head. Your texts. Those voice messages you'd send. Waking up to see your name on my phone first thing. God, I miss it. Miss you. Those mornings waiting for your call... all those stupid little jokes that only we understood. It's like it all vanished overnight, and I didn't realize what I had until it was gone.
I want to reach out so badly. Just tell you I'm sorry. That I finally get it now - I understand how much I hurt you. But... would that even help? Would you even want to hear from me? You blocked me everywhere, and honestly, maybe that was the right call. Maybe you needed that clean break to heal. But I don't know how to move on either. I just... miss you. Miss us.
I wish I could go back and do things differently. Notice all those little signs. All the ways you tried to show me you cared. I wish I'd cared more when it mattered. Now all I've got is this... emptiness. This feeling that I lost something irreplaceable. And I don't know if I can ever fix it.

~anonymous

text:
#1842
After everything that happened that day in KUET Whispers, I realized I had to make a decision—even if it was based on made-up replies. I remember sitting in my room, scrolling through our messages, feeling this heavy weight in my chest. At 1:13 AM, I decided to message her. I just had to get everything off my mind.

We started talking about our daily routines like nothing had changed. But when I asked her about the made-up posts in KUET Whispers, her reply made it seem like she didn’t even care. It felt like I was talking to someone else.

I tried to make her see things from my perspective, tried to help her understand how I felt, but it was clear she wasn’t listening. When I brought up priorities, she brushed it off like it didn’t even matter. And she wouldn’t admit where she was wrong. That’s when I realized—I couldn’t keep doing this. I couldn’t keep being the only one trying. So, I made the decision. I broke up with her, but honestly, I don’t think she even cared.

It’s been two days since then, and I still can’t shake the feeling. Moving on isn’t as easy as I thought. Every time I send a message on WhatsApp and see those grey checkmarks instead of green, it hits me all over again. I keep thinking about all the little things—the good nights we’d text every single day, the morning calls I always waited for. I miss her voice, her jokes, even the silly arguments. I miss when she’d tease me over the smallest things, like when I didn’t like her Instagram story. Those moments meant everything to me, but now they feel so far away.

I don’t even know if I did the right thing by blocking her on everything. I still want to hear her voice, to feel like maybe things could’ve worked out. But then I remind myself why I did it—to stop the cycle of hurt. I miss her sweet words every night, the ones that made me feel like everything was okay. And now, I’m just left with this emptiness, not knowing how to move on. She’s changed, like she’s a completely different person now.

I didn’t want to tell anyone about this, but I needed to get it out. Maybe in the future, I’ll look back at this and laugh, but right now, it feels like I’ve lost something that truly mattered to me. I’m just trying to make sense of it all. It’s tough, but I guess it’s part of growing up.

~ The guy from the deleted #1816

text:
#1835
Reply to #1834,

I get why you’re feeling this way, and it’s completely okay to have these thoughts. The past can leave an impact on people, but that doesn’t mean he’s still emotionally attached or that you don’t matter to him. Instead of overthinking, try to have an open and calm conversation with him, let him know how his words make you feel, not in a confrontational way, but so he understands. If he truly cares about you, he’ll make an effort to reassure you. At the same time, focus on his actions rather than just his words about the past. If he’s with you now, it’s because he wants to be, and as long as he’s making you feel valued and secure, try not to let old memories overshadow what’s real between you two. But if his actions ever make you feel like you’re competing with a memory instead of being his priority, then it’s okay to reflect on whether the relationship is giving you the happiness and security you deserve. Relationships grow through understanding and patience, so trust in what you have and communicate openly because you are important, and you should always feel that way.

~anonymous

text:
#1821 *new*

Jara miss korsen tader jonno.
So, what was these all about?

1. #1816 (The Hurt Boyfriend) – This guy is deeply invested in his relationship and feels neglected. He makes time for his girlfriend but doesn’t feel the same effort from her. His frustration builds up to insecurities, and he even compares himself to her ex, which shows how much this situation is affecting him.

2. #1819 (The Girlfriend’s Response) – She claps back hard, defending her personal space and priorities. She points out that his expectations feel controlling and calls out his insecurity. Instead of trying to address his feelings gently, she goes into full-on attack mode, which only escalates the situation.

3. #1821 (The Boyfriend Tries to Reason) – He’s not demanding full control but just some attention. He opens up about why he acts the way he does and suggests a conversation to sort things out. He seems more willing to compromise, but his emotional state is fragile.

4. #1822 (The Breakup Moment) – He finally gives up. His patience has run out, and he declares the end of the relationship. His tone suggests that he feels defeated rather than angry.

5. #1823 (The Internet Troll Enters) – Someone jumps in with sarcasm, making fun of the whole thing. This is the typical internet response when things get too dramatic—people start trolling.

6. #1824 (The Confession & Reflection) – This person admits that they faked #1819 for entertainment, but after reading the replies, they realize the original situation was serious. Then they write a hypothetical response as if #1821 was real, adding their own thoughts on the matter.

# My Take on This Drama:

The guy in #1816 seems emotionally invested but a bit too dependent on his girlfriend for validation. His frustration is valid, but comparing himself to her ex is a mistake.

The girl in #1819 might have valid points, but her delivery is harsh. She could have reassured him instead of attacking.

#1821 was an attempt to fix things, but by then, emotions were too high.

It’s a classic case of relationship imbalance, where one person feels ignored, and the other feels suffocated.
 
So, apnarao jara future e eishob korben..shabdhane.

~anonymous

text:
#1810

I feel like dogshit. I am a grown adult with a developed body and mind, yet I still have to rely on my parents for everything.

I remember last Ramadan. I was having my first iftar in KUET when it hit me—I hadn’t earned a single khejur on my own. I had never felt so ashamed of myself. My mother has dedicated her whole life to ensuring I have a bright future, and here I am, feeling worthless, not knowing how I could ever repay her or make her happy.

I don’t like asking my parents for things. They are capable, and though they struggle a bit, they manage. I know these feelings might seem unnecessary to many because, in a few years, I’ll start earning, right? I don’t know. I feel such shame that I can’t imagine a life where I’m anything but a subject of pity.

Since when has knowing the truth kept us from feeling miserable? At times, I even feel ashamed to exist. And I hate myself because survival demands so much from a man.

~anonymous

text:
#1807
Life is a manifestation of the laws of thermodynamics, specifically entropy, the universal drift towards disorder. There used to be a flow, a rhythm, a sense of direction. But now my universe extends infinitely, creating voids in my head. The farther it extends, the more I am scattered, lost in the spaces between what was and what is.
I long for thread to guide me. What about a reference point in this magnificent chaos. But even a single thread can twist itself. Stability is a dream. 
Maybe the answer is not to fight the entropy but to go with it, to spin something whole from the disparate fragments.

~anonymous

text:
#1793
I would be grateful if you post this.  

If this post triggers you, I apologize—I don’t mean any harm.  

For as long as I can remember, the sole goal of my life was BUET. Egoistically, I also thought I would at least get BUET URP. Unfortunately, I failed badly—my name wasn’t even on the list.  

But somehow, by the Lord’s mercy, I got KUET EEE.  

I always dreamt of BUET EEE, but the Lord decided KUET EEE for me.  

All my friends are posting about studying at BUET, sharing rag wall pictures. Although I respect them, it would be a lie to say it doesn’t sting my soul. My mother constantly criticizes me (she is right—it’s my fault for failing).  

Mainly, I just wanted to ask for some advice from my KUET EEE seniors.  

Yes, I failed BUET badly. So, I can’t just relax, chill, or watch series. I feel like vomiting...  

With due respect, I want to start studying EEE course material now. After February 26, I believe I have had enough rest. Please, I beg you, don’t abhor me. I would always be grateful if any seniors could suggest some resources.  

I don’t want to lose anymore—never. At least not after five years, when all KUET and BUET students from the HSC ‘24 batch will graduate. I want to be far better than BUET’s HSC ‘24 EEE students.  

If I seem irrational, I apologize again.  

I have had my fair share of rest, and I would love to be busy now because every free moment is gradually draining all the confidence I have.  

If this post irritates you, I am sorry.

~anonymous

It's been 11 months since I last texted you—almost a year, huh? Time changes so fast. It feels like just yesterday, yet also like I’ve been missing you for lifetimes. So much has changed.

I remember those first few days when I realized you were never going to be mine. I was in denial, clinging to the hope that maybe—just maybe—something would change. Then came acceptance, though a small part of me still wished for you, knowing it was never going to happen. I consider myself a logical person, but the heart has its own ways. Looking back now, I find it silly. How foolish I was. The duality of my own heart astonishes me sometimes.

Lately, you’ve been quite active on Facebook. You look happy, my love—so happy and content. Seeing you like this brought tears to my eyes. Happy tears. Maybe that’s how life works. We don’t always get what we want, but we end up where we’re meant to be. Did you ever imagine you’d be this happy with her? Maybe we break so that our pieces can be rearranged where they truly belong.

In these 11 months, I’ve felt everything for you—disappointment, sadness, anger, unbearable rage, and love… so much love. Do you know how much my heart suffered, carrying all those contradicting feelings? You’ll never know. And you don’t need to.

I was reading a book where a girl tells a boy, 'She just wants him to remember her—to remember that she existed and that they used to walk beside each other.' That line made me think of you. That’s all my heart asks for—to be remembered by you. I dont know why it is still so much important to me to be remembered by you.To not become just another face in the crowd of your past.

Life moves forward. We grow older. We meet countless people and forget so many of them. But I can’t bear the thought of being one of the forgotten ones in your life. Do you understand that? When the nights are quiet, and my thoughts wander, I imagine us crossing paths years from now. I picture you walking past me like a stranger, not recognizing me at all. How would I stand that? I can't.

So, this is all I ask: even when time fades your memories, even when you start forgetting things—please remember, I existed.

I hope you have a long, beautiful life, filled with happiness and love with the girl that makes you the happiest.

~anonymous

text:
#1771
Dear ARS,

I have come only to say this—though we no longer talk, no longer meet, no longer exist in each other’s orbit, you may think I despise you most. But in truth, I miss you more than words can bear.

Every moment we shared still lingers in the corridors of my memory, vivid and unyielding. In the world of my imagination, you remain the most luminous moon, radiant and untouchable. Whenever I gaze upon the night sky, I do not see the moon—I see you. Your smile, the one I cherished above all else, still haunts the edges of my soul. The moon’s meaning, its very essence, may change for you, but to me, it is you.

Believe me, I long to erase these memories, yet I cannot breathe without them. Your smile once stirred tempests in my heart—a storm not of ruin, but of love.

I cannot say all that remains unspoken, but I will say this—I have never stopped seeing you, never. Even now, I know every detail of your world, just as you once knew mine. I only wish you had weighed your feelings with the gravity they deserved… perhaps then, we could have been more than a story lost in time.

—Your past moon, drowned in an abyss of irredeemable , whispering echoes of a forgotten light.

~anonymous

Borderline Personality Disorder (BPD) is more than just mood swings—it's a complex mental health condition that affects emotions, relationships, and self-identity. People with BPD often experience intense emotions, fear of abandonment, impulsive behaviors, and difficulty maintaining stable relationships. text:
#1752
Answer on 1749 : 
"A person can be in a relationship and still feel unloved because love is more than just being with someone—it’s about feeling truly seen, understood, and accepted"

When I wrote that line, it wasn’t about whether I have someone in my life; it was about the fear that even love has conditions. The fear that if someone knew every part of me—especially the painful parts—they might not stay. That kind of fear lingers, even in love.
Feeling unloved isn’t always about the presence or absence of a person. Sometimes, it’s about the battles within—past wounds, self-doubt, and the parts of us we think no one will ever fully embrace. And sometimes, love is there, but it doesn’t reach the places where the emptiness resides.
So, the contradiction isn’t a mistake—it’s reality. Because love and loneliness can exist in the same heart.
P.S : Thank you for asking this question

~anonymous

#1746
Slowly, I realized that he called me his best friend, but in the end, I wasn’t. He said it only to comfort me. Because for me, he was both my best friend and my lover. But I noticed that he never treated me the way he treated his old best friend.

I saw him being so kind to her, always putting in effort, always making plans with her—being with her like she was the one for him. I knew she was his first priority. But when it came to me, I saw nothing, felt nothing. I had to beg for his care and love, ask him to make an effort. And all he said was, "Eigula faltu jinish." He yelled at me. Isn't it sad?

I just wanted to be his best friend, to feel the way she did. I wanted to be a priority, not a beggar for friendship. I put my whole heart into him, into this friendship, but still, it wasn’t enough. I have nothing left in me.

Was asking for friendship too much? I’m sorry.

But let me tell you one thing, dear—

You lost me. You lost the girl who loved you the most and only wanted to be loved and prioritized.

~anonymous

text:
#1743
- So, tell me about your dream..

- My dream?

I want to live in a cozy house with big windows that protect me from the world but still let me watch it, and every morning the golden light of sun drips on the curtains and makes me feel warm inside and out..

To stare at the clouds everyday just to remind myself that everything changes and life goes on..

To wake up someday with a heart free of pain, a mind free of worries and eyes free of tears, and to write positive thoughts in my diary instead of writing sad words and depressing feelings..

I want my future home to be filled with books, flowers, plants, fairy-lights, candles and aesthetic vintage things, with my favorite melodies and music playing in the background all day long..

To make a "escape from reality" corner and run to it when things get hard, to have calm days, and quiet nights.. to own a place I can call "Home .. Sweet Home"..

To stop thinking about who left me, and forget all the painful memories to start focusing on myself, only myself..

And one day, to look at the night sky with happy eyes and see the stars shining brighter than ever, to feel that warmth in the cold days, covered by my blankets, while listening to the sound of rain..

To work in a job that suits me, to travel to all the countries I wished for my whole life, to see new places and go to many different adventures then, get back to my home and write notes about those exciting moments..

I want the air to smell like a delicate mixture of baking, vanilla and coffee, while I'm reading a book, to sit in the balcony and talk about life, movies, shows and everything with my bestfriend, the moon..

I just want the peace of having my own safe space in this world, to be exactly as I imagine.....

~Adrita Rahman

text:
#1742
Nights are long. Very long. 
The night's quiet, except the fan hanging from the celing. It's breathing. It's alive. 
Just not long enough to have the sleep I want. 
All I say to people nowadays is that I need sleep. I want sleep. Not the kind of sleep where you just switch to another universe where everything's just the same as the one I'm living in. 
I broke a vow today- a vow that was so sacred to me.
Now I'm slowly drifting towards that sleep. I just hope I don’t have to be a living and breathing creature in that sleep, too.
When will it all make sense? When will I get to be a a little less miserable? 
When's all going to end? Or is the long term pills- taking-days are going to start again?
I do not want anything from life. It's given me a lot. I just want to be a little less miserable.
Just a little less miserable. 

~misery in human form I guess

text:
#1730
Don't know what to say.....Just starting with a sorry, to that girl of *SE 
Being a shy and one woman addicted man I never thought that I would become this what I am turning now. I loved a girl for many years..we were in a good relationship. But don't know what happened we broke up
 (4-6yr latter) before our admission test. I couldn't take it, it cost me my admission to recover thinking everything will be fine....but as we know life is not that kind. So after admission I tried to call her but she changed her numbers , so me who hated smoking started to smoke. Then one day found her pictures with her BF.. well kinda shocked but as a person who is always jolly and happy who keeps the whole group in the rhythm.... tried to maintain my outer personality. It only cost a few nights and some cigarettes to find out that it is done...but that love for her keep insisting to call her..so managed her number and called her. Answer she gave me was like ""We were not even good friends"". Yess..life is hard..So recalling the dialogue of GOT I tried to die the boy and raise the men in me by destroying everything she gave except the scars . Well couldn't help thinking about her...but people around me could never guess what I was passing by...to them I was the same chill backbencher lively man... Going with the flow I told myself that I need a relationship to survive..if she can why can't I? So I texted that girl... don't know what but  talked about her or easily flattered her. But then what? I realized that I can't do it...I can never become that type of man...The guilt that I tried to use such a lovely girl only for me...became another burden..also couldn't get the courage to tell her...I am ashamed.So sorry for you...I can't do anything about it..but yes I won't text you anymore....

I decided to do so few days ago, so live was going eaxm is near ,Clock is tiking, late at night want to sleep but can't sleep suppressed upon the burden of guilt. Don't know what happened become very desperate to see my ex, so Openned an fake account and went to see her... maybe that's the biggest fault I have done in these days, Watching her hands in some random persons hand ,getting the cares I used to get , I just couldn't take it, me who is a so called 'sigma' in the outer part... started crying like a baby...the desperation to get her was tearing me apart... the millions of flashbacks with her coming towards me, can't stop it from hitting me, also recalling that all these means nothing to her... finishing the packets of cigarettes and crying from my core heart was the only thing I did. Taking as little space I need to fit myself in I folded myself just to cry deeply.....Realizing I was never this person, and what have I turned into... again the burden of guilt recalls me, Being a person always respecting women, to trying use them for my self...this degradation can't be me.... Also asking if I am the victim or I am the villain....??
Again thinking how can anyone forget a person so quickly with whom she passed her 7yrs....
Is this the meaning of being human ?Becoming social creatures....or is this her professional call for becoming doctor...

Don't know what..but I am sure of this that I can't forget her.... maybe my love is getting deeper for her....I feel yes, maybe I deserve this , I also tried to do so.... only I could tell the girl from KUET , that this isn't me and I am ashamed by looking into her eyes.... Praying to God to relief me from this burden and give the courage to hold her in my fleeings....

It's 3am and I can't sleep for the last several days, thinking all this , wanting to feel light by sharing it....

~anonymous

text:
#1714
Dear H,

Valentine’s Day is nearby. I may say that it’s a cliche to feel sad that we won’t be going out or something. But I don’t have control on what I dream. Do you know the Palestinian poet Mahmoud Darwish? He wrote, Can I choose what I dream of… so I don’t dream of what won’t come true. He loved an Israeli girl named Rita. He loved her greatly but not greater than his homeland. Can you imagine his pain? A man reduced to grief. I only imagine his pensive eyes when he thinks of Rita. I have the same sea in my eyes when I think of you. 

I don’t believe that heartbreaks sound like glass shattering. It’s like the sound of the shiver of rain on a winter morning. It’s when a man feels he has forgotten how to breathe and afraid that his heart might forget how to beat as well. 

I have a picture of you on my desk. I am looking at it with the sea in my eyes. I have CT tomorrow. But these lightest of eyes calls me to fly with you. You are like a bird when you move. There is this poem by Farouq Jwaydeh which goes like,

“And if the devil was to ever see you, he’d kiss your eyes and repent”.

~anonymous

text:
#1706
I despise this life I am leading. I am plagued by relentless health issues—unpredictable, untimely, and unyielding. Just when I begin to feel a little better—not entirely well, but better—I find myself running again, desperate to keep moving. I fear leisure, as if stillness itself might consume me.

I was once the kind of person who would help others cross the road without a second thought. Now, even that simplest act of kindness sends me into a panic. Anxiety has become a constant companion, and with it come waves of distress that drain me to the core. I overthink, and before I know it, a panic attack takes hold. The weight of it crushes me so completely that I can no longer rise—I miss classes, I avoid everything. And then, when I finally regain a fragment of strength, I throw myself into endless tasks, trying to stay occupied, as if I am running away from my own self. But this isn’t me.

People talk about me—so many words, so many judgments. I pretend not to care, and maybe I truly don’t. But does that mean their words never sting, even in the slightest? How many people actually understand what I go through? How many even take the time to know? And if they don’t, why do they speak so carelessly?

I try to find happiness in the smallest things, to show the world that I am doing fine. I keep myself busy, constantly engaged. But does anyone know how much of it is forced? How much of it is merely an act of survival?

And the worst part—falling ill before an exam, missing it, or barely making it through in a miserable state. Do they think I choose this? Do they think I want this life? If only they knew how much I long for a healthy, normal existence.

~Anonymous

I was once the kind of person who would help others cross the road without a second thought. Now, even that simplest act of kindness sends me into a panic. Anxiety has become a constant companion, and with it come waves of distress that drain me to the core. I overthink, and before I know it, a panic attack takes hold. The weight of it crushes me so completely that I can no longer rise—I miss classes, I avoid everything. text:
#1678
Not from KUET, but there’s this boy who used to be my partner—before everything fell apart. I remember the day he left for Khulna; we had already broken up by then. But he was kind enough to let me know he was leaving. I couldn’t say much to him, but little does he know that a single text shattered me. We had to go our separate ways, but how am I supposed to accept that I won’t even catch a glimpse of him when I walk past our favorite street? Or our college? It’s not like I never wanted to reach out afterward, but he said he was fine on his own—that this place had somehow saved him. Maybe that’s what kept him sane through it all—keeping himself busy. So, I eventually stopped bothering him. But not a single day goes by when I don’t think about him or wonder how he’s doing. Sometimes, I read the writings on this page—a collection of bittersweet experiences, mostly about how exhausting this life can be. He said this place saved him, but I know how much of a family person he is, how easily homesick he gets. He struggled to adjust, but thankfully, he found some good companions here—which, honestly, was a relief to know. I just hope this place isn’t draining the life out of him.

~anonymous

text:
#1677
Six months ago, I promised myself that I would move on from you completely and never look back. But as I wrote those words, tears streamed down my face. Now, when I think about that moment, I feel nothing but sorrow for my heart.

Did I succeed in letting go? No—I failed miserably. I was determined, but my heart refused to listen. Since then, I have spent countless nights crying myself to sleep, waking up with unbearable headaches, and carrying a heaviness I can’t seem to shake. Every morning, the first thought in my mind is you; every night, you linger there still.

I’ve lost count of how many times I’ve checked your profile, knowing it would only deepen my pain, yet I can’t bring myself to stop. I feel helpless, trapped in this cycle of longing and heartbreak. I pray, hoping for the strength to let go of something that only brings me suffering.

Last night, I saw your post. I tried to be strong, to accept the reality that you were never mine to begin with. But no matter how hard I try, my heart keeps breaking over and over again.

I once read, "If you go through love and come out with your heart intact, you didn’t love properly." But I never needed to love you properly—I never needed to love you at all. And yet, here I am, carrying a wound so deep it refuses to heal.

~anonymous

Dearest,

I miss you so much that it actually physically hurts at this point. What if all this endless, excruciating waiting leads us nowhere? What if the future we’re so worried about, so terrified of ruining, never even comes to pass, and all we truly have is this moment–slipping through our fingers, vanishing before we can hold it close?

Maybe that’s why Franz Kafka wrote: 
"Perhaps we don’t love unreasonably because we think we have time, or have to reckon with time. But what if we don't have time? Or what if time, as we know it, is irrelevant? Ah, if only the world were ending tomorrow. We could help each other very much."

Truth is, time is uncertain, the future never guaranteed and maybe this is all we get.

~anonymous

My dear sister, 
I miss you much more than I intended to. We talk everyday over phone but I really miss cooking new foods with you and eating them with you, the extremely rare fights and quarrels which happens twice a years at most and lasts for 2 minutes, standing by each other even when the other is wrong, watching 'one piece' together and comment on how reckless Luffy is. Saw that new recipe on YouTube? "Let's make it! ^^". Need to rant about what shitty people did what shitty thing to you? I am always ears. Found your new 2D husbando and wanna tell me about how handsome he is? And about the new game you are playing and how you got caught by father playing that at 4 a.m.?(Bro got cooked XD) About our pets and how spoiled they are? About the latest quarrel (/flirting -_-) going on between our parents? What about yet another new skill you are developing? Wanna brag about how much you progressed on that? Damn, I miss shopping with you and giving my food away to you because you like it more (even though you are the elder one hehe ^^) and watching you eat it happily, talk about our dreams on travelling the world and trying out all the crazy things this world has to offer. 

Now we don't live together, but at the end of the day we talk to each other. It just feels like therapy. I don't care about whoever hurts me and can always stay happy and cheerful bcz I know at the end of the day, even if the entire world abandoned me, I will have you. That's enough for me. Through the distance, I realized, my heart is not capable of loving anyone more than this. When I have a hard time, I keep thinking of the next vacation we will be together. This alone gives me enough reason to keep moving forward. Speaking of vacation, prepare that dish you were talking about that day in the next vacation. #1654
Four months - such a short time, yet enough to change everything.

In these four months, I have fallen as far as a person possibly can. 
I went from hating smoking to becoming a chain smoker.
From a bright student to one who struggles with even the basics.
From my family's greatest hope to its biggest liability. 
From a calm and composed person to someone short-tempered and aggressive.
From loving sports to feeling completely detached from it.
I have come face-to-face with my own inadequacies in every aspect of life.
And in the end, I have realized just how much of a failure I have become.

Four months - more than enough to lose myself.

~anonymous

I don't even know how I got into this. That day, I went to meet my friends. You were there for an announcement. Somehow, I ended up there too.

What you did—seriously? You didn’t even leave the stage for your girlfriend. Not cool, huh? The way you tried so hard to steal the spotlight. (Later, I realized she wasn’t your girlfriend.) Everyone around was entertained.

I don’t know what’s on my mind. Why am I even writing this? For someone whose name I don’t even know?

Tomorrow is special. I know you’re at home, but still… I wish I could see you just one more time.

Ugh, I seriously need to clear my head. I might be overthinking everything. None of this makes sense. It’s probably just my brain being a mess.

—cosmia

text:
#1626
The Office was his favorite sitcom. He adored the chemistry between Pam and Jim, always talking about how perfect they were together. During our relationship, he had told me a thousand times to watch it. But life kept me busy, and I never found the time.

Now, I’ve finally started watching it. But the universe, in its own cruel way, decided that we wouldn’t be together anymore.

I scroll through Pam and Jim’s edits on Instagram, watching their effortless love unfold, and I can’t help but wonder—why didn’t I watch this sooner? Maybe I would have understood love a little better. Maybe I would have seen what he saw.

But love is a language I still don’t understand. And now, with every episode, every scene, every moment that reminds me of him—breathing feels a little heavier.

~anonymous

text:
#1612
Lately I was observing some depressing post related to KUET in this page. I just wanna share my side of the story regarding KUET. I am of batch 23 and before coming here, I didn't have much expectations for uni life. Just before I shifted here, fate drifted me away from my closest friend circle after an incident. I thought that I won't be able to trust people again and won't be able to make new friends let alone be in a group. With all these thoughts and thousands of memories which I created with my past friend circle, I came here. Days went by and Alhamdulillah I feel so blessed that I literally get to know some good hearted souls. They always made me felt important to them and was there when I was having a breakdown. I hope our friendship remains the same Insh'Allah. Speaking about the campus, I felt KUET is very lifely compared to other universities of Bangladesh. There are places here where I can just take a stroll for relaxing. I didn't get to know many seniors but the ones I got to know, they are literally so nice. I love how they show affection towards me like I'm their younger brother. Hanging out with them feels like hanging out with an elder brother which I never had. text:
#1609
Dear H,

The gloominess looms over me once again. There is no point of me writing these anonymous letters. I understand this. But what else would I do? The nights are long and I don’t have a soul beside me to let my breath be heard.

I had such humble dreams my love! I dreamt of us walking an entire afternoon around the empty campus. I dreamt of us listening to Fade into you by Mazzy Star on repeat. How heartbrokenly the chorus shatters me, FADE INTO YOU! You are like this mythic beauty, a jewel god created to adorn the scorched earth. And what am I but some dreams?  We never dream thinking it may never come to be, do we? I try to be close to you and always fall short. Why am I like this, the great repellent? I spent my entire teenage years trying to fit into a circle. Now I am this disgusting amalgamation of nothingness. Now it's late.

Can you recognize me from these writings? Do you understand that I am talking to you? Or do you want hints? I want to be heard. I am almost your shadow these days. I am denied an identity. I am constantly losing my chain of thoughts. I start a sentence and then zone out all of a sudden, to a distant place of inexplicably beautiful images. I dream of your laugh, that heavy burden of beauty that shirks your entire body. God, I may sell the earth for you. I had promised to leave the poetics behind. But then I would have to write in medical terminology. Can you imagine love being diagnosed as a cardiovascular disease that kills people through thoughts and images? 

I don’t care about the scrutiny I receive. All I want to achieve is to catch your eye. Here I am, a person of flesh and dreams vanishing away like leaves in autumn in love. Won’t you read me before I am nothing but a dead bark? Won’t I have the dignity of being a human?

~anonymous

text:
#1600
It's been four years since I broke up with my ex. She was not only my girlfriend but also my best friend and the only close friend I had in school. At that time, I couldn’t even imagine being with anyone else. I had so many dreams built around her, and we even planned to get married after finishing our studies.

However, during lockdown, her best friend told me that she was double-timing me with a senior. When I confronted her, she claimed it was because I wasn’t giving her enough time. That excuse felt absurd,I used to spend 4-5 hours with her every day and talk to her for countless hours. It was heartbreaking and shocking to realize that all my efforts still weren’t enough for her. Looking back now, I understand that, for a cheater, any excuse can be used to justify their actions.
It took me four long years to move on. During this time, I completely distanced myself from girls,I didn’t talk to anyone after breakup. Unfortunately, this prolonged isolation has left me with trust and communication issues.

Even when I want to talk to someone now, it feels like I’m stuck and no words come out of my mouth. Acting like an introvert might seem fine, but deep down, there’s a void inside me. I feel hollow because I don’t have any close people around me.

~anonymous

text:
#1580
To a KUETian Girl,

3.5 Years of Us, and the Truth I Didn’t See.

For the past 3.5 years, I devoted everything to one person. I poured my heart, soul, and every bit of effort into our relationship. I made sacrifices I never imagined, letting go of things that mattered to me, just so I could make her happy. I truly believed in us and in the promises we made.

But life has a strange way of revealing the truth. For the past year, I discovered that she has been dating someone else while still being with me—a KUETian. The pain of betrayal cuts deeper than I ever thought possible. Knowing that the person I trusted most chose to deceive me is a heartbreak I wouldn’t wish on anyone.

I don’t share this to gain pity or sympathy. I share this because I need to let go of the weight I’ve been carrying silently for so long. It’s hard to describe the hurt of giving someone your all, only to find out that your love and loyalty weren’t enough for them.You just misunderstand me and left me.But I left everything & come Khulna for her.

To anyone reading this, let my experience be a reminder to value yourself. Love is a beautiful thing, but it must be mutual, honest, and respectful. If someone truly values you, they won’t make you feel like an option while keeping others on the side.But I will still loving you for the rest of the life.

To everyone else, remember that life goes on, even after the darkest of times.

~anonymous

I might be right or wrong but যতদূর আমি দেখছি why most of the girls in KUET are so worthless! I mean ১২ টা বছর কষ্ট করে এত এত মানুষকে পিছনে ফেলে এসে এত নির্জীব হওয়ার মানে টা কী?! Why girls are not so passionate like boys?? I'm not comparing but girls in KUET are like good-for-nothing! Just class এ আসো,রং বেরঙের কালি দিয়ে ডিজাইন করে class note বানাও। আবার নিজের আবাসস্থলে back করো and guess what দিনশেষে ওই কোনো একটা ব্যাডার লগে quality time spend করে আসো। You girls got admitted here passing a competitive period only for doing these shitty things?!! সবাই-ই যে এমন তা ঠিক না,কিছু কিছু আছে ভালোই dedicated! But not so passionate in technical things! Career related চিন্তা ভাবনায় মগ্ন থাকতেই বেশি দেখা যায়। এখন কথা হচ্ছে দিন শেষে এগুলোই যদি goal ছিল তাহলে engineering এ আসার দরকারটা কি ছিল,ভাই!! Innovative জিনিস গুলোতে মেয়েদের আগ্রহ একেবারে শূন্যের কোটায়! Even in this 21st century!! Why brotha why?? 

~anonymous

text:
#1553
I can't say it out to you, so I am saying it here because I'll lose my mind if I don't say it to anyone. I can't even tell my friends, you know, because I'm scared someone will rat me out. I'm scared if you get to know, I'll lose you for good. Been repressing myself for 3 years now. I am scared to look at you because, god, what if you see the love I have been hiding in my eyes for you? Not that you'll ever look into my eyes, because your eyes are fixated on someone else. I get it. Its okay. I am not complaining. I won't ever. Its on me. God, you're just one of the nicest souls I've ever met. Kind. Empathetic. Loveable. Did you really have to have the dimple? Wasn't your words enough to kill me just a little every day? So I walk away from you. I tell you your glasses look weird on you because I can't say I love your eyes. I say you have a weird taste in music because I can't say that I still listen to the songs you shared with me on our first year. Anyway, soon we won't see each other. I am just a coward who'd never confess to you. Soon after graduation, we will part ways. And I know our paths won't cross. So I wish you all the best. I wish you deserve all the happiness. You. Deserve. This. I'm sorry the world has been cruel to you. I wish I could undo all the hurts you've been through, all the pains you never deserved. I wish I could protect you. But hey, I am glad you're better now. You're stronger now. You're happier now. I love you. I really do. And its okay that you don't. Not everyone gets the chance to love so deeply. And I am glad I've had the chance to fall in love, thanks to you. No regrets. 

~anonymous

Kuet er ekta hall e khabar niye eto besi chotoloki kora hobe, k vabte pare?
Onno hall gula ei jokhn khabar r man ager theke valo hocche, meyder ekti matro hall e khabar r man bhalo to dure thak, din din aro kharap hocche. Vat r chal er man eto kharap,  mone hoy bazar e giye bola hoy, j chal keu kinbe na fele deya hobe, oita dite
Abar keu jodi khabar niye ba onno hall related kono topic niye hall er fb grp e post ba comment kore, tader office theke deke niye ei niye question kora hoy, dhomok deya hoy. Emon ki anonymous post, ja hall er group e hok ba kuet er onno group e hok, kora hole admin theke name jene takeo daka hoy. Bhoy e ekhon keu kotha bolar o sahos pay na
Ager provost r time e hall e rajniti esechilo. Notun provost asa ei ta dur holeo, kono unnoti hoyeche bole to mone hoy na, aro dindin meyra kono kichote mot dear sadhinota o hariye feleche. Notun notun jokhn ja iccha rules diye deya hocche

text:
#1544
In the quiet of the night, I hear your name,
An echo in my heart, a lingering flame.
Memories dance in the shadows, soft and slow,
A bittersweet ache only I seem to know.

Your laughter still whispers in the wind’s gentle tune,
And I chase your smile beneath the pale moon.
Though time moves forward, it doesn’t erase,
The warmth I once found in your embrace.

I miss the moments that felt like forever,
A bond I thought the world couldn’t  sever.
But now, I hold on to what we once knew,
A chapter closed, yet etched in view.

You're gone but can't leave my heart.
I still love you a lot.

-Anonymous

text:
#1534
I have shown you the bitter truth not to destroy you, but to make you understand, and you are telling me that I have hurt you by bringing up your traumatized side? Do you truly understand what it means to break trust?

Breaking trust is when someone promises to hold your hand but lets go halfway through the journey.  
It is when the person you love has someone else fully occupying their heart and soul instead of you.  
It is when the one closest to you fails to understand even a fraction of who you are, while others see you clearly.  
It is when you watch love change its colors, becoming unrecognizable.  
It is when you see someone you thought you knew transform into someone entirely different.

True love doesn’t separate “you” and “me”; it unites us into “we.” Understand this first before speaking about love, trust, or anything. Someone's trauma is not just theirs; it is also heavy for the person who loves them. When you choose to love, you must move past "you" and "I" and embrace "we." If you think in terms of "you" and "I"  love gets lost. This was the best lesson of 2024.  

~The worst person in your eyes..

I saw you sitting alone today, and I couldn’t help but feel a little sad seeing you like that. I wanted to come over and ask if you were okay, but there were a few people around whom we both know, and I didn’t want to intrude as you told me to cut off all our contact.

I just wanted to remind you that you're a strong person, and I hope you’re doing alright. Sometimes, life can be tough, but I know you’ll get through it. If you ever need someone to talk to, I hope you know you’re not alone.

Take care of yourself, and I wish you nothing but happiness.

Sincerely,
Someone who cares

~anonymous

To the faculty saying "Bitfest এর জন্য 21 এর contribution কি?" I'm asking you - "21 এর জন্য বিটফেস্ট এর impact কি?" It's just your sheer luck that CSE'21 hadn't boycotted this circus. 

You put a departmental festival on term final and expect a batch to collaborate - what an audacity. Just take a in-depth look found what they have done till now. 

Imagine someone from 21's participation in Soccer Bot/LFR/Datathon/Hackathon; How many hours do they need to put in for these? Who in their right minds, would consider participating in those in the midst of the exams - talk fest কামলা later.

Festivals like this one are arranged primarily to encourage the students to be competitive, to make their realize where they are now and where they should improve. Leaving no space for home students to participate how do you expect your institute to excel? 

~anonymous

text:
#1520
I trusted you and shared my most vulnerable, traumatized side—my unheard inner child.

You said you trusted me too. Only later did I find out why you trusted me. I never wanted to be the person you could trust with Van Gogh's Starry Night.
You used every bit of my vulnerabilities, every bit of the innocence of that inner child, to ruin me. You can't even imagine how devastating it was for me, how it completely changed me, and how the word "trust" means nothing to me now.

You always take the sweetest rose and crush it till the petals fall. That's how I'll always remember her.

Never trade your weaknesses, vulnerable side, and traumas for an artist like Van Gogh who painted an amazing masterpiece like Starry Night but was self-loathing enough to cut off his own ear. - My biggest take from 2024.

~anonymous

text:
#1515
Ladies and gentlemen, bow down! 

For no mere mortal can ever match the divine, unparalleled, and absolutely groundbreaking friendship circles of ours. Forget Nobel Prizes or groundbreaking inventions – the real achievement of life lies in being part of "আমার বন্ধুদের মত কুয়েটে আর কোনো বেস্ট গ্রুপ নাই" (because clearly, every other friend group is just meh).
.
Our tours? Absolute masterpieces! While others take pictures of scenic beauty, we redefine the very fabric of tourism. Only our group has single-handedly revolutionized the art of hanging out, capturing selfies, and, of course, posting with captions like "এগুলাই মনে থাকবে🖤" because, you know, everyone else's memories are automatically downgraded to "forgettable."
.
And let’s not forget, আমাদের বন্ধুত্বের depth Nasa পর্যন্ত মাপতে পারে না। Your trivial friendships with genuine support and care? They are but shadows in the blinding light of our utterly flawless, cosmic-level connection!
.
But hey, don’t get jealous, mere mortals. Not everyone can have a friendship circle that redefines the laws of physics, breaks records in "friendship competitions" that no one else competes in, and possesses the audacity to claim:"আমরা সেরা! Rest of you? Try harder!".
.

Ah, behold the marvel of humanity – we are the Best Friend Circle™. You know, that our group of friends so extraordinary, so flawless, so godlike that all other friendships across the globe pale in comparison. If only the Nobel Committee recognized friendship dynamics, only our group would sweep every category.
.
Our tours? Legendary. Forget Machu Picchu or the Great Wall of China – our trip was clearly the pinnacle of human achievement. That group photo by the sea? An artwork rivaling the Mona Lisa. And those inside jokes that nobody else understands? Pure comedic genius – the world simply isn’t ready.
.
Only, we are living lives. Rest of you are living mediocre lives with mediocre people. Keep distance mediocre!
.
We will carry on our Best Friend Circle™, with our earth-shattering achievements of existing together. The rest of you should accept your inferior, subpar friendships, knowing you’ll never reach our divine levels of greatness.

~anonymous

If only the Nobel Committee recognized friendship dynamics, only our group would sweep every category. . Our tours? Legendary. Forget Machu Picchu or the Great Wall of China – our trip was clearly the pinnacle of human achievement. That group photo by the sea? An artwork rivaling the Mona Lisa. And those inside jokes that nobody else understands? Pure comedic genius – the world simply isn’t ready. . Only, we are living lives. Rest of you are living mediocre lives with mediocre people. Keep distance mediocre! . We will carry on our Best Friend Circle™, with our earth-shattering achievements of existing together. The rest of you should accept your inferior, subpar friendships, knowing you’ll never reach our divine levels of greatness.

text:
#1497
Dear H,

I wish to tell you someday that your eyes are like the Egyptian hieroglyphs. Symbols that veils a world unknown to me, your heart. I wish to know you more closely. You seem like a bird unheard of a cage. You move without any restraint, without a care for a thousand eyes and countless hearts fixed on you. You move like water moves on my palm when it’s still. It captivates me like nothing else.

There is also an indecipherable form of cruelty to your eyes. Your half sunken eyelids barely manages to stay open under the weight of it’s glamour. You blink a lot like a hummingbird. Your eyelashes brush off old wounds to scar newer ones. I never figured out why God’s most gracious and loved creature is also the cruelest.

I miss your face. Your irrefutable gestures. You have passed on to nostalgia now as if I have known you for a thousand years and have lost you for a thousand more. It’s funny how heart sees and thinks. Perhaps no one has ever thought of your blinking as the flying of hummingbirds or your eyes shaped like hieroglyphs. Perhaps no one ever will. But I do, I feel this profound metaphors murdering my sleep and sense.

Do you think martyrs care about the forthcoming honor? I don’t think so. Martyrs are the people without either past or future. They have a cause which must be reached no matter what. When the cause asked their lives, they complied unhesitatingly, not even knowing if it will grant it’s fruition. Martyrs are people who have escaped the circular prison of time. They are immortal.

Love is such a cause. But it’s a hypocrite. Love never asks for lives. It asks for nostalgia, hope, time. Love takes away immortality and strips us naked of any honor. It reduces us to a pitiful person who feels ecstatic just by hearing your voice or returning your gaze or simply watching you blend with the horizon. Love takes away meaning from things and assign us to give them newer meaning. Now, I can’t see a hummingbird without being saturated by the images of your blinking or can’t walk around the cafeteria without halting for a while to see if you are sitting somewhere with your friends. These irrational things have gained a even higher rank than calculus.

Now you tell me, my precious H, what will you call me? I’m neither a martyr nor a man. I’m a shadow of a thought that follows you not me. Even my shadows belongs to you. Won’t you adore such a creature who was not even permitted a shadow let alone a name? I miss you, I wish to see you soon.

- Someone you Know

text:
#1489
Dear H,

Whenever I am sunken in the depths of despair, I listen to Lacrimosa from the Requiem by Mozart. It doesn’t fill me with the thoughts of death. But its profundity haunts me. When Mozart started working on The Requiem upon an anonymous commission, he was ill. He had other projects on his plate but he began working on this not really knowing why, a drive from the unknown within perhaps. He kept going on, writing haunting pieces like Dies Irae and Rex Tremendae Majestatis but when he reached Lacrimosa, he felt as if he was writing The Requiem for his funeral. He was only able to write a little of the piece which meant tears. I like to think that Mozart was sunken deep in his tears and the horror of life ending its course overwhelmed him. A man reduced to his instincts. 

I believe Mozart was lucky to be reduced to instincts, I envy him for he was able to float above the immortal emotions like death, love, and horror. I am incapable of crying my nights out or wandering off of the streets whenever I think of losing you from my life. You might argue that you are not that important which I like to think. In my defense, I can only say that if we were to breathe voluntarily, I would still think of you more frequently even if it meant death. Why? you ask. I am like a moth who has found light but doesn’t know what to do with it. I go on with my day-to-day life with your thoughts on the back of my mind. It sounds silly, but I always keep looking around whenever I am around the campus, hoping to get a glimpse of you or perhaps go and talk to you. Do you know, you have a very distinct rhythm to your voice? It's very serene, very intimate. I feel as if you are talking without hiding anything from me, pouring your life out into the hands of an idealist like myself. I never wanted to be this way, my love. Growing up, we all had little to no choice about whom we must become. And I am clueless about how to handle how to cope with such overwhelming beauty.

Mozart ceased his work, and Al-Hallaz ran out screaming. What am I doing? Carrying on, barely. With you becoming omnipresent, it's almost blasphemy. I won't stand in front of you, maybe kneel, and express in the most light and defenseless manner how deeply I have loved you. I stop at the dark thoughts of your rejection which is most probable. I never understood why was I always denied love. What have I done to deserve such a fate? 

I will not plead. I don’t write to make it easier for me either. Among others, whenever I see you, I love to think that you have attentively read the whole letter and I love to think that the only possible name rooting from H is yours and you wonder who is the guy writing for you. At least leave a broken man with his imagination, my love. Can imagine a Kafka who didn’t write or a Van Gogh who didn’t paint? 

- Someone you know

text:
#1482
Dear H,

Whenever I am mortally tired, I think of you. You are like a shed on a desert highway. Often, when I am overwhelmed by life, I think of you and how mobile you are! You are like a breeze, always on the heels to fly away, and I think you look mismatched on campus. A handful of daisies on a block of concrete deepened by complexities of math and mortality.

I think about the time I saw you last, you walked away with your back to me. Your ever-shrinking figure was slowly dragging me into the messy reality of mine. I sometimes feel like Kafka. He used to come home, tired mortally from his bureaucratic life. To escape the horror he used to write from the depths of his imagination saturated with the jingle-jangle of his day-life. If I were to be like Kafka, I would only write about you. My heart, my mind, the entirety of my being is saturated with you and you only my love.

You make me incredibly anxious. You come to me as the only possibility of utopia where it's not blasphemy. God created the heavens and earth. And to link them, He created you. I try to be very jolly around you. But I am deeply troubled by the images of a world where I would no longer be able to be around your light and agile self. Life would be dark and stationary and nothing to dream about if I lost you. I fear, without you, I’d be called Sisyphus, The man destined to bear the eternity, pushing a boulder up the hill only to fall back upon compilation. I can’t imagine Sisyphus happy. Happy is the guy whose morning starts with your indifferent and defenseless sleeping face basking in the sun of immortality.

-Someone nearby

text:
#1479
I was sitting beside Poddo Pukur today, wondering if I’m truly worth being someone’s partner or friend. I was upset about something with my best friend but couldn’t say anything to him because I feel useless. How can I complain about being hurt when I feel like I have no value?

My academics and extracurriculars are nothing exceptional, so why would I be part of anything important? My partner is always kind to me, but deep down, I can sense her disappointment. I can’t bring myself to tell her what makes me feel bad because I question whether I even have the right to say anything.

After finishing all my classes, when I return home, I struggle to see my worth. My parents take care of me, and I feel like it’s for nothing. At 5 PM, I decided to distance myself from everything and everyone. She deserves someone much better. I’m sorry you had to stay with me for this long. Unfortunately, I couldn’t fit into this smart world.

Thank you to everyone who still praises me, even when I’ve done nothing good.

~Someone from '23

#1474
Dear admin, kindly consider posting this.

Brothers and sisters, I am currently at a very low point in my life and struggling with severe depression. I’ve come home for a week, carrying a backlog in my academics. I didn’t perform well in my CT exams and even missed some of them due to health issues. I suffer from chronic migraines, which are significantly affecting my life. I don’t think I can even manage to get a GPA of 3 this semester.

I’m feeling hopeless, especially since some people say that if you struggle in 1-1, it will be an ongoing issue. Is this really true? I’ve come home to rest and spend some time with my parents, but I can’t stop worrying. If I don’t do well in 1-1, does it mean I can’t improve in the future? Is it truly impossible to achieve a good CGPA, like around 4.00?

I’m feeling completely lost and my mental health is deteriorating day by day. I just need some guidance and reassurance from you, vaiya or apu. This is weighing heavily on me, and I feel like I can’t take it anymore.

- someone from 2k23

text:
#1461
I'm on the verge of collapse. I've tried almost everything—therapy, medication, you name it. But I guess you can't magically cure depression when the source of it is your very own classroom. Even though I only have about 4-5 months left in KUET, I don’t know how much longer I can hold on. I don’t know how to handle myself the next time (for the umpteenth time) one of my classmates shoots a hurtful comment directly at me or subtly hints at me through someone else.

I tried sharing a bit of my story with a friend, but she didn’t believe me. She stopped behaving normally toward me. When I asked her why I was getting such vibes from her, she claimed she didn’t know what I was talking about and asked me to define "vibe." That experience has left me scared to share with anyone else.

text:
#1456
At first, I lost myself… then, I lost you. And now, I can’t help but wonder how many more of those I care about will end up hurt, all because I can’t stop losing pieces of myself. I know life is all about letting things go, but damn it…..it hurts. It hurts so damn much. If only I could hold on to you harder.....

I have always told you that people leave and it’s fine—we just have to accept it. But now, it’s my own self that refuses to believe it. It’s too late now, and I know you’re not coming back. After all, it’s my own fault —that I took you for granted. I can’t blame you for leaving when all I did was push you further away, blind to see how much you truly meant until it was too late.

You will always be my best friend. And it kills me to know that I can never be that for you, not after everything I have put you through. But as much as it breaks me, I’d rather see you winning without me than be stuck here losing because of me. You deserve better, even if it’s a life where I’m just a distant memory.

~anonymous

text:
#1447
Dear H,

I wish I could have told you what I had to write anonymously. I am incredibly frightened right now. I know my love for you will go fruitless. I know, and so does everyone. But that doesn’t take away my liberty of loving you, does it? I know yet when one of my friends told me today why I am being so delusional, I was shattered. As far as I can remember, I was always horrified when I loved someone. Because I know my love will never be accepted. So I treated my love as something illegal and unspeakable. It has broken my heart  to uncountable shards.

When I looked at you from far and hidden, I felt the whole world pushing down on me. I haven’t cried like a baby for a long long time. I see you in my dreams. You come with your unmistakable lightness, and I never miss a chance to fall back into my cocoon of dreams.

You have eyes like the oriental queens. You smile a lot which makes me wonder, if it wasn’t for you, wouldn’t the world be a wide graveyard? For you, I always keep looking around for you just to get a glimpse of you. I listen to Joji a lot at night, my love. Why does every broken thing have an appeal but me? I swear, if you say the cost of an embrace is death, I’ll be the happiest man with a death sentence on earth.

I’m a mess. A room full of unwanted things. A life full of failures and forced nostalgias.  But I am a human, and every human deserves love to be able to breathe in this suppressing pressure chamber we call earth. And without you, I don’t think I can carry on with anything. I love you.

~anonymous

text:
#1278
To the girl from ECE

I know you won’t return my text. So I’ve come to write anonymously like a hopeless romantic. I like you very much. How much? To know that you need to find a way to measure the sky. 

The way you first called my name, ei Shuno, you took my heart away without breaking any ribs, nothing short of pure sorcery my love. From then on, my eyes naturally couldn’t miss a chance to look at you during classes. I lost count of how many hours I’ve spent trying to get a glimpse of you where the world around me kept talking about absurd things. You have turned the tables between the rational and the irrational. 

You have bent my knees to the point of writing a confessin where the sword of the exam tomorrow looms like a pendulum of a broken clock that can strike at any hour.

But I haven’t been disgraced enough to be called Qais, the man who fell for Leila in such a manner that people couldn’t tell the difference between him and a madman from the street, so they called him Majnu, the obsessed madman. The sense not stripped away yet pushes me to keep your thoughts captive to the darkest corners of my heart where it is not a rumor that the sun never shines on those you neglected. It’s a fact. The sun doesn’t shine, it just burns and burns until my bones scream out, “But I don't even have nerves yet I feel pain, how’s that possible my lord!” How’s it possible that you can’t get past your vanity and see my eyes where a garden burns every day and grows back simultaneously like a world devoid of a god?

No one knows I like you. I haven’t told anyone but you. I really can't understand the consequences. I know you would be bothered beyond limits by the looks and taunts of your friends if I confessed openly, I know you don’t like these. But if my feelings still stay trapped they may rebel and break their way out of my heart. Just imagine the mess it would make. Would you really prefer convenience over my life?

God is either laughing at me for I’ve dedicated myself to something that was not in my fate or testing me with cruel rigor to see if I am truly worthy to be with his one of the finest of creations, who would make the devil repent with just a call by the name. Tell who am I to read God's heart? I have no other option but to suffer in your negligence.

I have some sense left which has kept me on the study table and don’t worry I have studied enough. But I can’t sleep. I haven’t been able to sleep for night after night. I just keep thinking about how I messed everything up. How I keep making stupid mistakes that deter people miles away from me. Do you know I’m in constant anxiety about doing or saying something stupid that would make me lose all my friends?

The day when you told me to behave properly and stopped responding to my texts for I’ve shown a glimmer of my passion, I felt like the earth had moved from beneath my feet. I went to the tong, sat there, and smoked like the world had ended, cruelty prevailed and I had nothing to do but drown myself in grief. I understood then how deeply I like you and that your disapproval kills my entire world. You are truly precious. 

Forgive me for having typed this instead of writing on paper. It’s 5 am, I haven’t slept and my hands are shaking beyond imagination to write anything intelligible. And you won’t read anything so I let the world know, if you don’t hear my heart it echoes will find a way, believe me.

—Someone nearby

text:
#1276
I need some advice from you all. I used to be a really confident person once. Nothing used to scare me or nervous me or put me in a difficult position usually. During the admission session I got really scared. All of my cousins and close relatives around my age were studying in the most reputable public Universities of BD. So it was always expected that I would do the same as well. It was kind of a must for me. At first I was confident I would be able to pull it off. Then gradually my results in Udvash started to fall off. I got nervous. Then I sat for exams in BUP, BSMMRU etc places but didn't make it in the merit list. Then I started to panic. I was suffering from depression and it got worse with time. I got panic attacks in every exams after that JU, BUET, CKRUET, MIST, IUT etc. In my BUET & CKRUET exams I was blacked out for almost 30 mins due to panic attacks. I even used to forget the most basic formulas due to panic. Though I got chance in almost every uni I gave exam to except BUET & BUP. I'm still not confident about myself.  What if I mess up again in my uni exams?? At that time I get nervous and start to forget everything I studied. I don't know know how to overcome this.

- someone from 23

During the admission session I got really scared. All of my cousins and close relatives around my age were studying in the most reputable public Universities of BD. So it was always expected that I would do the same as well. It was kind of a must for me. At first I was confident I would be able to pull it off. Then gradually my results in Udvash started to fall off. I got nervous. Then I sat for exams in BUP, BSMMRU etc places but didn't make it in the merit list. Then I started to panic. I was suffering from depression and it got worse with time. I got panic attacks in every exams after that JU, BUET, CKRUET, MIST, IUT etc. In my BUET & CKRUET exams I was blacked out for almost 30 mins due to panic attacks. text:
#1274
You know what's the worst part of coming all the way here to Teligati?  It's not the adjustment issue, survival nor socialization. It's staying away from the most precious thing in life, 
My Mom.
Moving here I still don't grasp the full depth of how homesick I am. I'm feeling something I never felt before. 
This overwhelming pain, how can I make it stop ? 
I know it's time to enter the real world leaving the family zone behind but this is something I would never want. school days were peaceful, running back to home only to find mom waiting for me with my fav dishes. I did stay separated in college but this is something else. This is 264km far away to see her smile. I never knew,  it would hurt this much. Thing is, tears won't stop and my vision getting blury.  
I never knew I was this homesick. Tears reminding me how I took her words, care,  everything for granted. Ammu,  I miss you.. 

~ Nico D Tesla ME'23

text:
#1267
কিছুদিন ধরে আমি কিছুটা inferiority complex এর মধ্যে দিয়ে যাচ্ছি। I know it's really stupid but সব মানুষের মধ্যেই একটা illogical part থাকে and সেইটা কারণে অকারণে haunt করে। University admission test এ যাদের rank আগে ছিল তারা যে সাবজেক্ট গুলো choose করসে এটা নিয়ে তাদের pride থাকা and নিজেকে নিয়ে proud feel করাটা খুবই স্বাভাবিক and I really appreciate that.

কিন্তু প্রশ্ন আসে যে so called যারা নিচু ডিপার্টমেন্ট এর তারা কি তাদের চেয়ে কম যোগ্য? I really don't think so, but still এই so called department superiority exist করে এইটা university তে প্রবেশ করে আগেই ভালো মতো বুঝতে পারলাম। 

I always try to think positively and logically and I strongly believe that being logical is a core part of my character. If I feel this inferiority complex then I think there's other people as well. I do believe that everyone has their potential, the potential to shine, it doesn't matter সে লাইফের কোন পর্যায়ে বা কোথায় আছে এখন। I think he/she can make a difference.

বাংলাদেশের অন্যতম সেরা একটা বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়ে পড়ে inferiority complex এ ভোগাটা মোটেও যুক্তিযুক্ত না। Lastly I just want to say, the people who make others feel low just because of their department, maybe you got your desired department maybe you are talented but you don't have the most valuable thing, মনুষ্যত্ব!

~Someone from MSE(23)

text:
#1265
Today, I came across a word, "Querencia." It's a metaphysical concept, meaning a place where one draws strength, where you feel at home and most authentic. The idea feels so dreamy, like our short silly journeys, as if we’ve found our homes, peace. It feels like everything is bathed in warmth.It feels like it was all yellow.

But recently, I was shaken. I accidentally discovered that one of my relatives is cheating on his wife. No one else knows yet, just me. It's a complicated situation—he’s being manipulated, but at the same time, he’s actively participating in it. When I found out, I couldn’t hold back my tears, though I’m usually not one to cry. I felt so helpless. I can’t bring myself to tell anyone, especially his wife, because I know how much it would devastate her. Now I struggle to even look at him without feeling anger and disgust. I used to admire them as a couple, but now I just feel fear and distrust toward him.

Why am I sharing this with you? Because I needed to get it off my chest. And because, in a way, it connects to what I feel about us. I surely know that you don't see us together furthermore in the journey of life. I don’t want anything either. It’s clear to both of us that you already have a partner, and we even talk about that person. Still, there are silly moments when you make me feel like you are my 'Querencia.' Maybe this is all very normal for you as a gentle human being, but for me, it's hard to take it that way. I can’t risk being the reason someone else gets hurt, and I certainly don’t want to cause anyone to cry in their prayers.

I deeply value your presence and our friendship, but please, keep things transparent in your relationship. Don’t let any doubts arise. I care about you both, and I want nothing but the best for you. 

Be a source of peace for your partner; be the clam, be the Querencia; they already have so much to deal with in this cruel world.

~ Dawn
